arts.ttl: Barcelona preparing anniversary invite for Lionel Messi

arts.ttl: Barca register Szczęsny before Alaves clash
arts.sum: Barcelona have registered new goalkeeper Wojciech Szczęsny with La Liga ahead of their next match against Alaves on Sunday. Szczęsny has joined the club after coming out of retirement and has already been training with the team .

arts.ttl: Team News: Alaves vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's La Liga clash between Alaves and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Why Barcelona Will Wear Coldplay Sponsored Shirt Against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona will wear a Coldplay inspired kit when they face off with Real Madrid on October 26th as part of the club's sponsorship deal.

arts.ttl: One Barcelona star already has an offer to leave in January
arts.sum: Barcelona star Ansu Fati has an offer on the table to depart the club during the January transfer window. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Saturday provided an…

arts.ttl: Nico Williams remains coy on future amid Barcelona, Arsenal and Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Nico Williams has insisted he's 'happy' at Atletico Club after snubbing interest from Barcelona, Chelsea and Arsenal during the summer transfer window. “I’m happy in Bilbao, I’ve decided to stay here," said Williams.

arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczesny available to face Alaves as Barcelona secure La Liga registration
arts.sum: Earlier this week, Barcelona secured the services of Wojciech Szczesny. The former Arsenal and Juventus goalkeeper has been signed to replace the stricken Marc-Andre Ter Stegen, who will play no further part in this season. In order to be able to sign Szczesny, Barcelona had to receive approval for La Liga for Article 77 to […] The post Wojciech Szczesny available to face Alaves as Barcelona secure La Liga registration appeared first on Football España.
